title: Tetsuya Watanabe
wikitext:
'''Tetsuya Watanabe''' (渡邊 哲哉) was an episode director for the Evangelion TV series ([[Episode 11]]) as well as being credited for cinematography for [[End of Evangelion]]. Watanabe has worked as a director, producer, and storyboard artist for a variety of other anime works such as ''Bobobo-bo Bo-bobo'', ''Saber Marionette J'', ''The Big O'', ''Mai Otome'', ''Rumbling Hearts'', ''Cowboy Bebop'', and various ''Gundam'' shows. He also voices Harry Most in ''Mobile Suit Victory Gundam''.

[[Category:A to Z]]
[[Category:Evangelion Staff]]
{{Template:Staff}}
html:
Tetsuya Watanabe (渡邊 哲哉) was an episode director for the Evangelion TV series (Episode 11) as well as being credited for cinematography for End of Evangelion. Watanabe has worked as a director, producer, and storyboard artist for a variety of other anime works such as Bobobo-bo Bo-bobo, Saber Marionette J, The Big O, Mai Otome, Rumbling Hearts, Cowboy Bebop, and various Gundam shows. He also voices Harry Most in Mobile Suit Victory Gundam.
